nodes.label: Vocals Instrument Icon
nodes.description: Photograph of a large-diaphragm condenser studio microphone mounted in a spider shock mount on a boom arm, shot against a plain white background. Silver/grey metallic finish. Realistic photographic style, not an illustration or icon. Intended as a representative image for the Vocals instrument category in the HSM school management application.
nodes.subject: studio condenser microphone with shock mount
nodes.intended_use: instrument category image for vocals in frontend UI

nodes.label: Piano Instrument Photo
nodes.description: Close-up photograph of a white grand piano keyboard showing black and white keys with shallow depth of field and soft natural lighting
nodes.intended_use: instrument category image for piano in HSM school management UI

nodes.label: Drums Instrument Icon
nodes.description: Close-up photograph of a drum kit showing a metallic cymbal and snare drum with chrome hardware against a light background. Realistic photographic style with warm brown and silver/grey tones. Intended as an instrument category image for the HSM school management frontend.
nodes.subject: drums

nodes.label: Guitar Dark Mode Icon
nodes.description: Close-up photograph of a guitar fretboard with strings and fret markers, shot against a dark/black background. Dark-themed photographic asset used as a dark-mode variant icon or background image for the guitar instrument in the HSM Management frontend.
nodes.visual_content: guitar fretboard close-up, dark background, warm wood tones, gold/brass fret wires and dot inlays

nodes.label: Drums Dark Mode Icon
nodes.description: Dark-mode photograph of drums/percussion instruments — close-up of a cymbal and drum head on a dark background. Used as an instrument icon for the Drums category in the HSM Management frontend.

nodes.label: Vocals Dark Mode Icon
nodes.description: Dark-mode photograph of a studio condenser microphone with a mesh grille capsule mounted in a shock mount/suspension cradle, shot against a near-black background with subtle purple/violet accent lighting. Used as the vocals instrument tile image in dark theme.
nodes.subject: studio condenser microphone

nodes.label: Piano Dark Mode Icon
nodes.description: Close-up photograph of a grand piano keyboard shot in dark/low-light conditions with blue-purple ambient lighting, showing white and black keys against a dark background

nodes.label: Talking Cleff Mascot
nodes.color_scheme: white body, orange accents (ears/hands/feet), dark gray joints, blue glowing oval eyes
nodes.purpose_in_ui: chatbot assistant or enrollment helper mascot

nodes.label: Cleff Talking Animation
nodes.description: An animated GIF of a small, friendly robot mascot named Cleff. The robot has a white rounded body, glowing blue rectangular eyes, orange arms and feet/legs, and two antennae on top of its head. The style is 3D-rendered with a cartoon/toy aesthetic. It appears to be a talking or interactive state animation used as a UI mascot for the HSM Management app.

nodes.label: HSM Brand Logo
visual_elements: abstract vertical bar chart / equalizer bars in yellow and orange (left side)
stylized HSM lettering with guitar neck integrated into the S letter
guitar silhouette in black with red sound hole circle
full brand name in black uppercase sans-serif
tagline with MUSICIAN highlighted in red bold

nodes.label: Multi-Bot Image Asset
nodes.description: 3D rendered illustration showing six cute white robot characters with orange accents, dual antennas, and orange ear-pieces on a black background. Top row shows three larger robots in different states: left robot has spiral/hypnotic eyes with a sound wave emanating from head (listening/processing state), center robot has neutral spiral eyes (idle state), right robot has a blue LED display showing 'HELLO!' text with an orange speech bubble containing a sound waveform (greeting/speaking state). Bottom row shows three smaller robots all displaying friendly blue LED faces with smiling expressions (happy/friendly state). The robots are white with orange shoulder joints, hands, and feet. Image is used as UI illustration for the conversational enrollment bot feature (agent/enroll endpoint).
nodes.ui_purpose: Visual branding for multi-agent or chatbot enrollment interface

nodes.label: Robot Listening State
nodes.description: Top-left robot variant: spiral/hypnotic eyes, sound wave animation above head — represents active listening or processing state

nodes.label: Robot Idle State
nodes.description: Top-center robot variant: neutral spiral eyes, no additional visual effects — represents idle/standby state

nodes.label: Robot Greeting/Speaking State
nodes.description: Top-right robot variant: LED display showing 'HELLO!' text, orange speech bubble with waveform icon — represents greeting or speaking state

nodes.label: Robot Happy State
nodes.description: Bottom row (three robots): blue LED smiley face displays — represents friendly/happy/engaged state; shown in three sizes suggesting scale variants

nodes.label: Conversational Enrollment Agent Feature
nodes.description: The /api/agent/enroll LLM-powered conversational enrollment endpoint that the multi-bot image visually represents in the UI

nodes.label: Cleff Rotating Animation
nodes.description: Animated GIF mascot depicting a small white robot character with glowing blue rectangular eyes, orange accent joints/arms, and two antennae on its head. The robot has a friendly, approachable appearance suitable for a UI mascot. Used as an animated decorative element (the 'Cleff' mascot) in the HSM Management frontend application.
nodes.ui_purpose: decorative mascot animation — likely used as a loading indicator, welcome element, or branding character in the React frontend

nodes.label: Orange Robot Character
nodes.character_style: 3D rendered toy-like robot with rounded forms and a friendly appearance
colors: orange (ear discs, arms, feet, antenna tips)
nodes.expression: neutral/friendly — blue glowing eyes suggest an approachable, curious demeanor
nodes.apparent_ui_purpose: chatbot icon or AI assistant avatar, likely used as the conversational enrollment agent icon in the HSM management app

nodes.label: Full Rotation Sprite Sheet
nodes.description: A 4x3 sprite sheet showing a 3D rendered cute robot character in a full 360-degree rotation. The robot has a white rounded body, orange ear-like side panels, blue glowing eyes, small antenna on top, orange feet, and dark gray joints/limbs. The 12 frames show the robot from front, three-quarter front, side, three-quarter back, back, and intermediate angles, covering a complete rotation. Background is solid black. A small white sparkle/star icon appears in the bottom-right corner.
nodes.subject: robot character

nodes.label: Robot Character
nodes.description: Cute 3D rendered robot with white rounded body, orange ear panels, blue glowing rectangular eyes, single antenna, orange rounded feet, and dark gray articulated limbs. Appears to be a mascot or UI character.

nodes.label: Attendance Tab
nodes.description: Top navigation tab labeled Attendance with calendar icon, currently active/selected

nodes.description: Top navigation tab labeled Dashboard with graduation cap icon

nodes.description: Top navigation tab labeled Students with person icon

nodes.label: Mark Attendance Page
nodes.description: Page titled Mark Attendance with subtitle Record student attendance

nodes.label: Attendance Details Form
nodes.description: Card form titled Attendance Details with subtitle Select a student and mark their attendance

nodes.label: Cleff Animated Mascot
nodes.description: Animated GIF mascot depicting a small white 3D-rendered robot with orange accents (antenna tips and arm joints), a round head with blue circular eyes (one winking), and a friendly smiling expression. The robot has a compact humanoid body with a white torso, short legs, and a cheerful cartoon aesthetic. Used as the Cleff mascot/character in the HSM Management frontend UI.
nodes.animation: Animated GIF; character appears to be in a friendly idle or greeting pose with a winking expression
nodes.ui_context: Frontend mascot image asset used in the React/TypeScript SPA for Hyderabad School of Music management system

nodes.label: Rotating Cleff Character
nodes.description: A 3D rendered cute robot mascot character shown from six angles (front, three-quarter front, back-right, back-left, rear, three-quarter back) on a black background. The robot has a rounded white body, glowing blue oval eyes, orange ear-like side panels, a single ball-tipped antenna on top, dark grey articulated arm and leg joints, and orange feet/hands. The back panel shows a small rectangular detail (possibly a port or hatch). The character has a friendly, toy-like aesthetic reminiscent of consumer robot companions. Used as the 'Cleff' mascot/icon for the HSM Management application UI, likely rendered as an animated or rotating sprite to serve as a loading indicator, chatbot avatar, or branding element.
nodes.design_style: 3D render, cartoon/chibi robot, white and orange color scheme, black background, turntable multi-angle sprite sheet
nodes.intended_ui_usage: Mascot/avatar icon, possibly animated rotation in UI (suggested by filename 'Rotating_Cleff'), used as a chatbot or AI assistant character within the school management frontend

nodes.label: Quick Mark Today Section
nodes.description: A card section titled 'Quick Mark Today' with subtitle 'Quickly mark attendance for today's classes'. Lists students with their instrument and Present/Absent toggle buttons.

nodes.label: Student Attendance Row
nodes.description: Repeating list item pattern showing student name, instrument name, and two action buttons: 'Present' (green text, outlined) and 'Absent' (red text, outlined). No pre-selected state visible — both options unselected.

nodes.label: Attendance Dashboard Component
nodes.description: The AttendanceDashboard React component that renders the Quick Mark Today attendance flow.

nodes.label: Present Status Option
nodes.description: Green-outlined button allowing teacher/admin to mark a student as present for the day's class.

nodes.label: Absent Status Option
nodes.description: Red-outlined button allowing teacher/admin to mark a student as absent for the day's class.

nodes.label: vocals.png
nodes.description: Image of a Rode microphone on a boom arm with a shock mount.

links.note: Located in frontend-enroll/public/ — used as public-facing brand asset in the web application
Logo features a stylized acoustic/classical guitar forming the vertical stroke of the letter 'S' in the HSM monogram
Bold, uppercase sans-serif font for both monogram letters H, S, M and full brand name text
Guitar icon within the monogram communicates the music education focus of the institution
